targets.name: True Night Drifter of the Drunken Palm

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

passives.desc:
When taking damage during the combat phase: +20% damage for the turn
During the combat phase: On Clash Lose, take +15% damage from the Skill
passives.name: Damage Taken

passives.desc: Deal +2% damage for every 1% missing HP on self (max 100%)
passives.name: Plastered Training

passives.desc: Turn Start: at max [SipOfAlcoholJin] Stack, consume 2 of its Stack and gain [DrunkAwakening]
passives.name: I've got nothing to fear with a bottle of wine by my side

passives.desc:
Encounter Start: reset this unit's SP to 10
Take -50% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], and [Sinking] (rounded down)

Take -30% damage from Sinners

If this unit gained 2 or more [SipOfAlcoholJin] last turn, heal 5 SP for every 10% missing HP at Turn Start (max 40)

When entering a new phase, if this unit is Staggered, recover from Stagger
passives.name: Night Drifter of the Drunken Palm

passives.desc:
Activates if at least 1 enemy has 10+ [Laceration] at Turn End
Against enemies with [Laceration], inflict 1 [DrunkBlood] for every 5 [Laceration] they have (3 times per enemy)
passives.name: River of Blooddrops (血滴成河)

skills.desc:
